steps.title: Use the graphical meaning of a solution
steps.content: A solution to a system of two equations is the point where the two graphs intersect. Here, the line and the absolute value graph cross at one point.

steps.title: Read the intersection
steps.content: From the grid, the intersection point is $(1,5)$. The point $(4,2)$ is the vertex of the absolute value graph, not the solution to the system.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: The solution is $(1,5)$, which matches the correct answer, C.
